title: Airwolf Theme (Cover/Remake by Enzo Margaglio) Dolby Surround 5.1
author: Enzo Music

detail.Title: Airwolf Theme (Cover/Remake by Enzo Margaglio) Dolby Surround 5.1
detail.Description:
Airwolf Theme in Dolby Surround 5.1 (Cover/Remake by Enzo Margaglio)
℗ 2025 by Enzo Music
© 1984 by Sylvester Levay
@EnzoMusic_de 

⚠️ Important: The "Stable Volume" setting is disabled, so you might need to turn the volume up quite high. Please remember to lower it again afterwards!
-
Let the lady🚁 fly through the room with your surround system! 
The sound is not fake, it's real Dolby 5.1 surround! Of course not just the lady but also the music.

Tip: Chrome or Firefox may only play in 2.0, you can fix the problem by playing the video directly via the Smart TV app.

I thank you, have fun!
In memory of Jan-Michael Vincent and Ernest Borgnine❤️
-
The beautiful add-on helicopter from Cowansim Model 222B for MSFS can be found here: https://cowansim.com/product/222b-for-msfs/
or here: https://flightsim.to/product/cowansim-msfs-222b
Flight simulator: https://www.flightsimulator.com
-
This is a cover/remake. All instruments were performed and recorded by Enzo Margaglio. No samples from the original were used.

I create music with heart and soul and do not use AI under any circumstances, now or in the future.

Please respect the rights of this cover/remake. Commercial use is not permitted.

Here is a list of all instruments in my studio: https://enzo-music.de/instrumente.htm

Support me: https://paypal.me/EnzoMargaglio
Enzo Margaglio on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/intl-de/artist/4iCdv16fDjkoPtyZbtRJiu
Enzo Music Website: https://enzo-music.de
